title: CreateClusterRequest
description: CreateClusterRequest schema from Amazon MemoryDB API

ACLName.description: The name of the Access Control List to associate with the cluster.

Description.description: An optional description of the cluster.

EngineVersion.description: The version number of the Redis engine to use.

NodeType.description: The compute and memory capacity of the nodes.

NumReplicasPerShard.description: The number of replicas to apply to each shard.

NumShards.description: The number of shards the cluster will contain.

TLSEnabled.description: A flag to enable in-transit encryption.
